---
title: "Capital IQ"
page-layout: article
---

# Capital IQ

**Provider:** S&P

## Description

Financial intelligence platform providing company financials, transactions, ownership data, market information, and professional profiles worldwide. Widely used for business, investment, and economic research.

## Listing categories

- **Subject area:** Business & Economics
- **Data/resource type:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Data Platform
- **Access model:** Individual Account Required, Yale Licensed
- **Displayed topic:** Company & Organization Data, Financial & Market Data, Data Platform

## Access notes

Requires registering an individual account with a Yale email address. Individuals who do not want to create an individual account can use S&P NetAdvantage for similar functionality.

## Links

- [Access resource](https://library.yale.edu/eresources/access/access-capital-iq, https://guides.library.yale.edu/capiq)

[Back to Datasets & Databases](../datasets.qmd)
